_meta.purpose: Metadata registry for bibliography items without local PDF or with paywall. No PDF content stored here.
_meta.protocol: Only verified metadata from primary sources. No invented DOIs or URLs.
_meta.note: PDF download requires human signature per CLAUDE.md §biblio-fetcher protocol
